name: Chukyoiyakuhin Co.,Ltd.
summary: Chukyoiyakuhin Co.,Ltd. sells pharmaceuticals and quasi-drugs, health food products, soft drinks, medical equipment, cosmetics, daily necessities, clothing, food, water, and life and non-life insurance products. The company provides its products through mail order delivery. Chukyoiyakuhin Co.,Ltd. was founded in 1949 and is headquartered in Handa, Japan.
